  -o, --old             Required. Path or URL to old OpenAPI Specification.

  -n, --new             Required. Path or URL to new OpenAPI Specification.

  -f, --outputFormat    (Default: Json) Specifies in which format the
                        differences should be displayed. Possible values: Json |
                        Text.

  -s, --strict          (Default: false) Enable strict mode: breaking changes
                        are errors instead of warnings.

  --help                Display this help screen.

  --version             Display version information.
